name: Couscous and Chicken Salad with Orange-Balsamic Dressing
recipeIngredient: 3 pounds roasted chicken, skinned, boned, and cut into bite-size pieces
1.5 cups diced drained roasted red bell peppers (from jar)
15.5 ounce can chick-peas (garbanzo beans), rinsed and drained
3 tablespoons balsamic vinegar or red wine vinegar
recipeInstructions:
For Salad: Bring 4.5 cups water to a boil in a large saucepan. Add couscous and currants. Cover, remove from heat, and let stand for 5 minutes. Fluff with a fork. Transfer to a large bowl and cool.
Mix all remaining salad ingredients into the cooled couscous.
For Dressing: Mix the first four ingredients in a bowl. Gradually mix in olive oil. Pour dressing over salad and toss. Season with salt and pepper. (Can be made 1 day ahead. Cover and chill.) Line a large bowl with romaine. Add salad.
